subcodes.first_line: O ye two luminous candles in the gathering for the proclamation of God's Cause! Today is the day of utterance, and the time hath come for melody and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو شمع پرنور در محفل تبلیغ امر الله امروز روز بیانست و وقت وقت نغمه و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the power of words; of speech
